---
title: "Cole Monson"
about:
  id: intro-heading
  template: trestles
  image: images/pfp.jpg
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:monson2@stolaf.edu
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/monson2/monson2.github.io
---

::: {#intro-heading}
Hi I'm Cole, a developer interested in using data, math, and code to explore questions that don't have obvious answers. This site is a running collection of projects all built from curiosity.

[he/him/his](https://pronouns.org/)

Mathematics + Computer Science Major with Statistics and Data Science Concentration <br>

[St. Olaf College](https://wp.stolaf.edu/) <br>

### Cool Things I Sometimes Do

App Developer \| Project Friendship

Sound Technician \| The Basilica of St. Mary

Audio/Video Engineer, Broadcast Director \| St. Olaf Broadcast Media

St. Olaf Band (Tenor Sax), St. Olaf Handbells
:::

### Get in Touch

**Email**: <a href='mailto:monson2@stolaf.edu'>monson2 at stolaf.edu</a>
